---
# Geofence-warrant exhibit. The structured "Geographical Area"
# attachment that accompanies a Google Sensorvault geofence warrant.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-geofence-warrant.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is the geofence search warrant served on Google LLC,
  describing the geographical area, time window, and target
  accounts.

exhibit-type: geofence-warrant
exhibit-title: "GEOFENCE SEARCH WARRANT -- GOOGLE LLC"
geofence-window-start: "2024-04-22 16:20 EST"
geofence-window-end:   "2024-04-22 17:20 EST"
geofence-center:       "39.180835, -86.532128"
geofence-radius-m:     150
geofence-narrative: |
  This warrant applies to the Google Accounts associated with
  devices that were located inside the geographical region bounded
  by the latitude/longitude coordinate above and the time window
  listed. The targeted area encompasses 415 W. Sullivan Street,
  Pawnee, Indiana, and an adjacent business the unidentified
  subject fled toward following the incident.
---
